Package in.co.rays.proj4.bean

Class CollegeBean

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.BaseBean
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
DropdownListBean
public class CollegeBean extends BaseBean
CollegeBean is a JavaBean class that represents a College entity. It is used to handle records of the ST_COLLEGE table. This class contains college-related attributes such as name, address, state, city, and phone number information. It extends BaseBean to inherit common properties like id, createdBy, etc.
Author:
Harshit Panchal
